reasoning: VIX at 27.26 in HIGH regime and rising +4.17% overnight signals elevated fear with building momentum. Risk-off rotation confirmed by sector weakness (XLK −0.4%, XLF −0.87%) while energy (XLE +3.01%) rallies on flight-to-safety. Ribbon maintains BEAR stack structure (spread 105¢). Overnight gap essentially flat (+0.16) indicates no surprise overnight sentiment shift. Zero macro events on today's calendar creates a clean RTH tape for fear-driven moves. High VIX makes put premium expensive but increases probability of bearish setups.
